findings.description: The display-math block giving x = 9 - (9/4)y² - z² is immediately followed by numbered step blocks that explicitly interpret this equation, but the display-math block and the following numbered blocks do not share a group_id (the numbered blocks share g-worked-example but the display-math block also has g-worked-example, so they are grouped — actually checking: faa2f548 has group=g-worked-example and the numbered blocks also have group=g-worked-example, so this is fine).

The block states horizontal traces z = k exist only for |k| > c, but for the standard hyperboloid of two sheets z²/c² - x²/a² - y²/b² = 1, traces exist for |k| ≥ c (including |k| = c, which gives a degenerate ellipse — a single point), so the strict inequality excludes the vertex circles.
findings.suggested_fix: Change '|k| > c' to '|k| ≥ c' (traces at |k| = c are the single-point vertices of each bowl).
